daily.today_energy: Your vibe is magnetic rn. There's a quiet confidence flowing through you that's hard to ignore. People are drawn to your authenticity today—lean into it and watch how things shift.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, your heart's speaking louder than usual. If there's someone on your mind, a genuine conversation could spark something real. Trust your gut on this one.
daily.career: Your creative ideas are hitting different today. This is the moment to pitch that thing you've been sitting on or take initiative on a project. Your energy is working *for* you right now.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and sunlight. Even a short walk outside will reset your whole system. You're radiating when you honor what feels good physically.

weekly.overview: Your week is giving main character energy, Leo. The cosmos is basically creating a spotlight just for you right now. Trust your gut instincts—they're incredibly sharp. This is your time to plant seeds for something bigger.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or exploring, there's genuine magnetism happening. Real conversations feel easier, and people are drawn to your authenticity. If you've been hesitant about something, the vibe supports taking that small risk.
weekly.career: Creative momentum is real this week. Your ideas have teeth, and people actually want to hear them. Channel that confident Leo energy into finishing something you've been procrastinating on. Recognition might come from an unexpected place.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for movement and sunlight. Whether that's a walk, dancing, or just sitting outside, honor those needs. Energy feels restored when you're outside your usual space. Rest isn't laziness—it's strategic.
